meta.home_title: Qiuyufei Apps — Simple, private iOS apps
meta.home_desc: Simple, private, honest iOS apps. Your data stays on your device — no accounts, no servers, no tracking.

hero.title: Simple, private, honest apps.
hero.subtitle: Every app is built around one idea: your data stays on your device. No accounts, no servers, no tracking.

values.private_desc: Everything is stored on your device. We don't run servers and can't see your data.
values.honest_desc: Free tiers stay free forever. No subscription traps, no fake countdowns.
values.global_desc: Every app is fully localized in 31 languages, with dark mode and accessibility support.

common.coming_soon: Coming soon to the App Store

quickcost.card_desc: A minimal expense tracker that keeps every record on your iPhone.
quickcost.subtitle: A minimal, private expense tracker for iPhone. Open, tap, done — in 3 seconds.
quickcost.meta_desc: QuickCost is a minimal expense tracker for iPhone. Log an expense in 3 seconds. All data stays on your device.

features.d: Open the app, tap the amount and a category — your expense is saved.
No account, no server. Your financial records never leave your iPhone.
Daily, monthly and category summaries show where your money goes.
Fully localized worldwide, with dark mode and large-type support.

quickcost.privacy_blurb: QuickCost stores everything locally on your device and collects nothing.

decibelmeter.tagline: Know your noise. Protect your hearing.
decibelmeter.card_desc: Real-time sound level meter with a daily noise dose tracker.
decibelmeter.subtitle: A real-time sound level meter with a daily noise dose tracker that helps protect your hearing.
decibelmeter.meta_desc: Decibel Meter measures sound levels in real time and tracks your daily noise dose. Audio never leaves your iPhone.

features.d: Real-time dB readout with MIN, AVG and MAX at a glance.
Tracks your exposure against the NIOSH 85 dB / 8 h guideline.
Audio is analyzed in real time and never stored or uploaded.
Start and stop measuring from your Home Screen or hands-free.

decibelmeter.privacy_blurb: All analysis happens on your device. No audio is ever recorded or uploaded.
decibelmeter.disclaimer: Noise dose figures are general reference information, not a medical measurement.

fastzen.card_desc: An intermittent fasting timer with no subscription traps.
fastzen.subtitle: An honest intermittent fasting timer. The free tier is complete — forever.
fastzen.meta_desc: FastZen is an honest intermittent fasting timer. Free core features forever, one-time Pro purchase, fully private.

features.d: All preset plans, the timer, history, streaks and notifications are free.
Custom goals and insights for a single payment. No subscription.
See the phases commonly associated with each hour of your fast.
No account, no server — your fasting history stays on your device.

fastzen.privacy_blurb: Your fasting history never leaves your iPhone.
fastzen.disclaimer: FastZen is a timer and logging tool, not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any fasting practice.

mathspark.tagline: One daily puzzle. The whole world plays.
mathspark.card_desc: Daily mental math puzzles with hints that teach.
mathspark.subtitle: Daily mental math puzzles — the same challenge for everyone worldwide, with hints that teach instead of spoil.
mathspark.meta_desc: MathSpark serves daily number puzzles — the same challenge for everyone worldwide, with hints that teach. Fully offline and private.

features.d: Everyone in the world gets the same puzzles each day — fully offline.
Strategy tips and a single next step, never the full solution.
The daily challenge and 5 practice puzzles per day are always free.
Unlimited practice, harder difficulties and full statistics. No subscription.

mathspark.privacy_blurb: MathSpark works entirely offline and collects nothing.
